description.zh-cn: 满件优惠(第N件折扣/买X送Y/第二件半价)：按规则对指定商品(或全部)每满(买X+赠Y)件，对其中 Y 件最低价单品按折扣率优惠(100=免费)，以负向费用项在结算实时抵扣。支持作用范围与折扣率配置。
description.en: Buy X Get Y / Nth-item discount / 2nd at 50%: for a scoped product (or all), every (buy X + get Y) units discounts Y cheapest units by a percentage (100 = free), applied as a discount fee at checkout. Configurable scope and discount rate.
